title: Transfection to Generate BacMam Virus containing SLC transporter and small scale expression testing
author: David B. Sauer
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This protocol is used to transfect Sf9 insect cells with the bacmid produced previously. The transfection of the insect cells leads to the generation of baculoviral particles later used to transduce mammalian host cells for expressing the SLC transporter.
steps_raw: This protocol is used to transfect Sf9 insect cells with the bacmid produced previously. The transfection of the insect cells leads to the generation of baculoviral particles later used to transduce mammalian host cells for expressing the SLC transporter.
